_meta.ontario_rta_notes: Pet deposits ILLEGAL in Ontario (RTA). Application fees ILLEGAL beyond credit-check cost. Key deposits MUST equal actual key replacement cost (refundable). Last-month rent deposit = ONLY legal up-front charge besides first month. Tenant insurance NOT legally required but most landlords mandate it in lease. All buildings unless otherwise noted: insurance_required = true (lease clause).
_meta.estimation_basis: Hydro estimate $50/mo for small 1-bed, $70-90 for larger/older. Tenant insurance ~$15-25/mo. Internet $50-80/mo if not included. estimated_monthly_total uses rent_1bed_low + parking + utility add-ons + insurance + internet.

parking_monthly.note: Underground available, fee not disclosed online; Minto typical $100-150

elora.promo: Up to $5,000 off + free WiFi on select suites
elora.notes: Free WiFi promo saves ~$70/mo. Mini-split AC = lower hydro vs central. Parking + heat/hydro/water status NOT disclosed on Minto site — must call (289) 778-5003. Pet wash station included free.

parking_monthly.note: Parking FREE per Apartments.com listing

battleford_glen_erin.notes: EXCELLENT VALUE: free parking + heat + water + A/C included. Only hydro + internet extra. With 2-mo-free on 14-mo, effective rent ~$1,791. Verify InterRent operator.

parking_monthly.note: Parking from $45/mo per listing; Reid is surface-only

reid_drive.notes: Heat + water included. Hydro extra. Cheap parking ($45). InterRent-managed — check operator reputation.

parking_monthly.note: Parking available, fee not disclosed; Hazelview typical $50-100

collegeway_2285.notes: 1-bed waitlist; 2-bed $2,190. Utility inclusions NOT disclosed publicly — call (289) 401-9832. Hazelview pattern: heat usually included in older mid-rises. 2-mo-free promo significant.

parking_monthly.note: Parking INCLUDED in maintenance fee (condo rental)

miracle_4900.notes: CONDO: maintenance fee covers heat/water/A/C/parking — landlord absorbs. Tenant typically pays hydro only ($40-60). Best fixed-cost predictability of any building. Verify pet policy in condo declaration.

parking_monthly.note: 1 parking space typically included in condo rental

arc_erin_mills.notes: CONDO: maintenance covers heat/water/A/C. Tenant pays hydro. 2-bed only currently ($2,700). Built 2019. Maintenance $0.66/sqft.

parking_monthly.note: Parking fee not disclosed online; new BGO build typical $150-200/mo

dialogue.notes: WORST utility profile — tenant pays ALL utilities. WiFi free for year ($60-80/mo savings). Smart-home thermostat. With 2-mo-free on 14-mo lease effective rent ~$1,925. Total real cost still highest tier.

parking_monthly.note: Indoor from $120, Outdoor from $100

lincoln_545.notes: EXCELLENT VALUE: heat + water included. With 1-mo-free on 13-mo, effective $1,703/mo. Even adding parking ($100) and hydro ($50) and internet ($60), total $1,913 — cheapest verified pet-friendly with utilities.

parking_monthly.note: Fee not disclosed; Park Property typical $75-125

mill_road_340.notes: Heat + water included, 'plus hydro'. With 1-mo-free on 13-mo + $1,000 cash effective ~$1,984/mo year 1. Co-working + WiFi lounge included.

parking_monthly.note: Parking INCLUDED in rent per CAPREIT

mimico_estates.notes: OUTSTANDING VALUE: parking + heat + water all included. Only hydro (window AC will spike summer) + internet extra. With 1.5-mo-free on 12-mo, effective ~$1,601/mo. Real total ~$1,771 = cheapest in dataset.

parking_monthly.note: Underground secured + guest parking; fee not disclosed

walden_circle.notes: Heat + water + sewer included. Hydro extra. CHEAPEST 1-bed ($1,710) with strong utility coverage. Pet status conflicting — verify in writing before signing.

parking_monthly.note: Both underground + outdoor available; Homestead typical $75-150

lakewood_1257.notes: Heat + water included; hydro extra. Homestead-managed (verify corporate complaints).

parking_monthly.note: Fee not disclosed on Greenwin/microsite; new build typical $150-175

forty_second_45.notes: Site says 'maintenance included' but utility breakdown NOT disclosed. New 2024 build → likely tenant pays all utilities. Call 647-800-6727 for full breakdown.

parking_monthly.note: Parking + locker INCLUDED per condo listings (typical bundle)

vita_on_the_lake.notes: STAR FINDING: many Vita rentals INCLUDE all utilities (heat/hydro/water) + parking + locker per condos.ca. Per-unit variance — confirm with each landlord. Best total cost picture in Toronto-close tier IF utilities included.

parking_monthly.note: Parking INCLUDED in maintenance fee per condo profile

lago_waterfront.notes: Maintenance covers A/C, heat, water, building insurance, parking. Hydro typically tenant. Pet wash station free.

parking_monthly.note: 1 parking + 1 locker INCLUDED with most units

eau_du_soleil.notes: Maintenance covers A/C + heat + building insurance. Tenant pays utilities (hydro/water) + tenant insurance. Premium amenities (saltwater pool). Parking + locker bundled. Large pets accepted = rare.

parking_monthly.note: Underground available; fee not explicit but typical Mimico ~$75-125

promenade_2301.notes: Heat + water included; hydro extra. With $1,000 bonus year 1 effective ~$1,812/mo. Solid value sub-$1,900 1-bed.

landmark_2493.notes: Heat + water typically included (Homestead pattern). Conflicting reports per source — confirm. Homestead corporate complaints — tour carefully.

lake_shore_155.notes: Hydro extra (~$20/mo per listing). Heat status not confirmed — InterRent pattern usually includes heat. Parking $25/mo = cheapest in dataset. Beautiful renovated unit per visual notes.

shoreline_towers.notes: Older twin-tower stock typically includes heat + water (parquet, baseboard heat). With 1-mo-free on 12-mo, effective ~$1,647/mo — cheapest verified-pet waterfront. EV charging.

park_lawn_285.notes: MASSIVE PROMO: 2 months free → effective ~$1,250/mo year 1 if base $1,500. Heat + water typical for older walk-up. Internet ready (free). Likely cheapest verified-pet in entire dataset year 1.

parking_monthly.note: Indoor $175, Outdoor $125 per listing

newholm_8.notes: STAR FINDING: heat + water included + 2 months free → effective ~$1,496/mo year 1. Even with $125 outdoor parking + $50 hydro + $60 internet still under $1,750 all-in.

sherobee_2170.notes: WORST utility profile in budget tier — TENANT PAYS ALL UTILITIES per Apartments.com. Add ~$200/mo for heat+hydro+water. Sister buildings on same street include utilities — anomaly. Verify before signing.

dixie_square_1750.notes: Heat + water included per Hazelview (conflicting source — verify). Pool, fitness, party room. CRB Certified Rental Building.

1011_lorne_park.notes: STAR FINDING: condo townhouse with utilities + parking included per condo profile. Lorne Park upscale residential. Best for Jack Darling dog park access. Older bldg → maintenance variability.
